Hello, I'm a Passionate Developer

Welcome to my digital showroom. I build neat, structured, and effective web solutions.

About Me

I am a self-taught creator focused on building clean layouts and accessible web environments. I am deeply interested in technology, problem-solving, and efficient coding standards. When I am not looking at a screen, I like reading and contributing to open-source discussions.

Technical Skills

  • Languages: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Python
  • Frameworks: Bootstrap, Tailwind CSS
  • Tools & Platforms: Git, GitHub, VS Code, Netlify

Featured Projects

Here are some of the applications and websites I have developed recently:

Project Title Description Link
E-Commerce Landing Page A fully responsive commercial landing page mockup displaying product grids and current promotional countdowns. View Code
Recipe Finder Web App An interface that searches ingredients and pulls matches using a third-party cooking API. View Code
Personal Task Tracker A simple application focused on clean productivity layouts to help users plan out daily targets. View Code
